title: Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam
tagline: Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kothandaramaswami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Nandambakkam, a suburb of Chennai, India.
overview.description: Kothandaramaswami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Nandambakkam, a suburb of Chennai, India. Dedicated to Rama, the spot is associated with the legendary sage Bhrigu.

topPlaces.name: Chennai Trade Centre
topPlaces.description: Chennai Trade Centre is a permanent exhibition complex in Nandambakkam, Chennai, hosting several trade fairs and conventions round the year. It is the first fair infrastructure that has been developed by India Trade Promotion Organisation (ITPO)—the premier trade promotion agency of the Government of India, Ministry of Commerce and Industry—outside Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Madras War Cemetery
topPlaces.description: Madras War Cemetery is located in Nandambakkam, Madras (Chennai), Tamil Nadu, India. It was created to receive Second World War graves from civil and cantonment cemeteries in the south and east of India where their permanent maintenance could not be assured.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Ramapuram is a neighbourhood in the western part of Chennai, India. It is situated on the Mount-Poonamallee Road at a distance of 3 kilometres from Guindy.

topPlaces.name: Butt Road Jumma Masjid
topPlaces.description: The Butt Road Jumma Masjid is a Friday mosque located in Parangimalai on the outskirts of Chennai, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Situated 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Chennai city and 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from Guindy on the Mount-Poonamallee Road, the mosque caters to the Muslim population of the suburb and the nearby cantonment.

topPlaces.name: Manapakkam
topPlaces.description: Manapakkam is a neighborhood in Chennai in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. A census town, Manapakkam is located along the Mount-Poonamallee Road in Chennai.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas Mount
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas Mount (also known as Parangimalai) is a small hillock in the Chennai district of Tamil Nadu, India, near the neighbourhood of Guindy and close to Chennai International Airport.

topPlaces.name: St. Patrick's Church, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Saint Patrick's Church is a Roman Catholic church located near St. Thomas Mount, in Chennai, India.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas Mount National Shrine Basilica
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas Mount National Shrine Basilica is a national shrine located in Parangimalai in Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam?
faq.a: Stays in Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kothandaramaswami Temple, Nandambakkam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chennai Trade Centre, Madras War Cemetery, Ramapuram, Chennai, Butt Road Jumma Masjid, Manapakkam.
